query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_test_users, SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'system' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as system_count, SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as manual_count FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%example%' OR email LIKE '%bulk%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_test_users, SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'system' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as system_count, SUM(CASE WHEN dataOrigin = 'manual' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as manual_count FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR email LIKE '%example%' OR email LIKE '%bulk%';
